From: Laura Abbott [mailto:labbott@fas.harvard.edu]
Sent: Wednesday, February 07, 2007 11:51 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: conference invitation

Dear Lesley,

 

Martin asked that I send Jeffrey the attached draft of an invitation letter for the conference currently being organized for the end of March. Please let me know if he has any questions or concerns.

 

Many thanks,

Laura

 

Laura H Abbott
